labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Pensiata - Bulgarian Pension Fund Analytics" provides 21 tools focused on data analysis & processing tasks. Core capabilities include analysis and computation, data access and reading, modification and updates. Key tools: list_managers, list_funds, get_nav_series, list_benchmarks, list_metrics.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Data Analysis & Processing" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: data, analytic, metric, chart.
labels.custom_label: Data Access & Management - Pensiata - Bulgarian Pension Fund Analytics

tools.name: list_managers
tools.description:
Retrieve Bulgarian pension manager metadata for UPF, PPF, and VPF/DPF schemes.

Use this to discover licensed managers and their supported scheme types before
running rankings or metric calculations over FSC-tracked pension data.
Data freshness: reflects latest ingested official FSC manager/scheme coverage.

tools.name: list_funds
tools.description:
List Bulgarian private pension funds and canonical fund IDs.

Returns `fund_id` in `manager_slug:scheme_code` format for UPF, PPF, and VPF/DPF.
Use this as discovery before calling NAV, metric, and ranking tools.
Data freshness: fund metadata follows latest FSC-tracked manager/scheme dataset.

tools.name: get_nav_series
tools.description:
Get official NAV time series for a Bulgarian pension fund (UPF/PPF/VPF).

Accepts either `fund_id` or (`manager_slug`, `scheme_code`) and returns normalized
NAV points for return/risk calculations and charting.
Data freshness: updated as new source NAV observations are ingested.

tools.name: list_benchmarks
tools.description:
List benchmark assets for Bulgarian pension comparisons.

Includes inflation and market references used to evaluate relative performance
of UPF, PPF, and VPF/DPF funds.
Data freshness: benchmark metadata is stable; prices are updated as new source data arrives.

tools.name: list_metrics
tools.description: List all supported financial metric identifiers for MCP analytics tools.

tools.name: cache_stats
tools.description: Return MCP cache telemetry for diagnostics and performance debugging.

tools.name: get_benchmark_series
tools.description:
Get historical benchmark series for pension-fund comparison workflows.

Use with compute/rank tools to compare Bulgarian pension funds against inflation
or market proxies over aligned periods.
Data freshness: updated as new benchmark source observations become available.

tools.name: compute_metric
tools.description:
Compute a metric for Bulgarian pension funds or benchmark targets.

Supports returns, drawdown, volatility, Sharpe/Sortino/Calmar, correlation, and
benchmark-aware metrics over configurable period and frequency.
Data freshness: computed from latest ingested FSC NAV and benchmark data.

tools.name: rank
tools.description:
Rank funds within UPF/PPF/VPF schemes by a selected metric and period.

Supports optional extra columns via `include_metrics` for agent-friendly table outputs.
Data freshness: rankings are computed from the latest ingested FSC-aligned NAV dataset.

tools.name: rank_benchmarks
tools.description:
Rank benchmark assets by metric and period for market-context comparison.

Data freshness: rankings reflect latest ingested benchmark observations.

tools.name: simulate_saver_outcome
tools.description:
Simulate saver outcomes with periodic contributions into Bulgarian pension funds.

Estimates invested amount, terminal value, and IRR-like performance diagnostics.
Data freshness: simulation uses the latest available NAV history in the dataset.

tools.name: get_bulgarian_pension_fund_managers
tools.description: Alias for `list_managers` with explicit Bulgarian pension context for agent discovery.

tools.name: get_bulgarian_pension_funds
tools.description: Alias for `list_funds` to discover UPF/PPF/VPF fund IDs for FSC-based analysis.

tools.name: get_bulgarian_pension_fund_nav_series
tools.description: Alias for `get_nav_series` with explicit pension NAV semantics for tool-RAG routing.

tools.name: get_bulgarian_pension_benchmarks
tools.description: Alias for `list_benchmarks` with Bulgarian pension comparison context.

tools.name: get_bulgarian_pension_metrics_catalog
tools.description: Alias for `list_metrics` so agents can semantically find available pension metrics.

tools.name: get_bulgarian_pension_benchmark_series
tools.description: Alias for `get_benchmark_series` to retrieve inflation/market comparators for UPF/PPF/VPF.

tools.name: get_bulgarian_pension_fund_metric
tools.description: Alias for `compute_metric` with explicit Bulgarian pension metric intent.

tools.name: rank_bulgarian_pension_funds_by_metric
tools.description: Alias for `rank` to semantically target Bulgarian UPF/PPF/VPF leaderboard queries.

tools.name: rank_bulgarian_pension_benchmarks_by_metric
tools.description: Alias for `rank_benchmarks` for semantically rich benchmark ranking discovery.

tools.name: simulate_bulgarian_pension_saver_outcome
tools.description: Alias for `simulate_saver_outcome` with explicit Bulgarian pension savings semantics.
